expectations.text: Excludes deleted files from review scope while still accounting for them in Excluded Files
expectations.evidence: Response says review scope `excludes deleted files and `.gitignore` files from review` and lists only `src/a.ts` and `docs/new.md` under `review_scope_files`.

expectations.text: Excludes .gitignore from review scope and reports it under Excluded Files
Uses Review Scope Coverage template fields including Completion Gate
expectations.evidence: Response includes `Review Scope Coverage` fields including `Completion Gate: Missing Files > 0 => INCOMPLETE (requires explicit deferment/approval)`.

expectations.text: Shows Missing Files and Missing File List consistent with reviewed non-excluded files
expectations.evidence: `Missing Files: 2` and `Missing File List: `src/a.ts`, `docs/new.md`` match the two non-excluded files still awaiting review.

claims.claim: Deleted files are excluded from review scope but still accounted for in exclusion reporting.
claims.evidence: The response excludes `src/legacy.ts` from `review_scope_files` while still listing it under `Excluded Files`.
